title: Partners & Affiliations
seoDescription: Collaborating institutions and affiliations of the Centre for Plant Medicine Research — logos, accessible names, and outbound link policy.
lede: CPMR works with government agencies, universities, and international organisations to advance plant medicine research and regulated herbal products. Partner marks are shown for identification; formal partnership statements are maintained by the Centre.
bodyParagraphs: Collaboration pathways include joint research, analytical services, and capacity building. For partnership enquiries, use the official contact routes published on the Research section when live.
outboundPolicyText: External links open in a new browser tab. CPMR is not responsible for the content or availability of third-party websites.
